subcodes.title: The Baha’ís Must Work with Heart and Soul to Bring About a Better Condition in the World: Words spoken on 1911-11-19 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: How joyful it is to see such a meeting as this, for it is in truth a gathering together of 'heavenly men'… Love and obey your heavenly father
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله امروز جمعیت خوبی داریم جهت آنکه این جمعیت ما جمعیت آسمانیست و جهت
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @unity; oneness of humanity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
